headlines.title: U.S. moves toward troop reductions in Europe as Hegseth scolds NATO allies
headlines.summary: The United States will review force levels and is immediately cutting the number of assets it would activate for the continent in a crisis.

headlines.title: First steps in peace deal demand far more from U.S. than Iran
headlines.summary: The memorandum of understanding requires numerous steps by Washington including lifting sanctions and freeing billions in frozen assets, while Iran was required only to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Ukraine pummels Russian capital with what may be largest drone strike yet on Moscow
headlines.summary: After weeks of intensifying bombing of Kyiv, Ukraine hit back with a swarm of drones, damaging buildings and igniting an oil refinery.

headlines.title: The local election that could topple Britain’s prime minister
headlines.summary: The outcome of a special election in the small working-class district of Makerfield could upend Labour Party leadership and U.K. politics.

headlines.title: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes
headlines.summary: Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months.

headlines.title: Andy Burnham wins key UK by-election, paving way to challenge Keir Starmer
headlines.summary: Greater Manchester mayor's victory in Makerfield clears path for bid to unseat Starmer as prime minister.

headlines.title: Zimbabwe bill to scrap presidential elections sparks backlash
headlines.summary: Supporters call the bill a governance reform, while opponents see a turning point for Zimbabwe's political future.

headlines.title: JD Vance delays trip to Switzerland for US-Iran talks: White House
headlines.summary: US vice president says 60-day negotiating period between Washington and Tehran has begun after deal to end war signed.

headlines.title: US judge orders release of Palestinian rights advocate detained by ICE
headlines.summary: Mosque leader says he was arrested and detained by immigration authorities for his Palestine advocacy.

headlines.title: Cuba’s Communist Party approves opening economy in unprecedented move
headlines.summary: The emergency economic package comes amid an ongoing US pressure campaign that has left the island nation reeling.

headlines.title: Luigi Mangione's lawyers withdraw plans for psychiatric defense
headlines.summary: In a court filing Thursday, Mangione's legal team said they won't file psychiatric evidence in the 28-year-old's state murder case. The move came a day after his lawyers said they planned to pursue a psychiatric defense.

headlines.title: Key FDA committee unanimously recommends its first vaccine since 2023
headlines.summary: All nine members of the committee unanimously voted to recommend Moderna's new mRNA influenza vaccine for adults 50 and over.

headlines.title: In photos: The Knicks celebrate their first NBA championship in more than 50 years
headlines.summary: The New York Knicks celebrate their NBA championship win with a ticker tape parade in Manhattan.

headlines.title: U.S. lifts blockade on Iranian ports as 60-day clock for a final deal starts ticking
headlines.summary: The U.S. is allowing ships to enter and exit Iranian ports and coastal areas as the countries move to a new phase of negotiations over the next 60 days.

headlines.title: Student loan borrowers will get an interest rate cut if they sign up for auto pay
headlines.summary: The Trump administration wants to jumpstart student loan repayment, with federal student loan debt approaching $2 trillion.

headlines.title: Nepal looks to strengthen collaboration with China
headlines.summary: Nepal's new government is looking to strengthen political engagement with China and expand cooperation in areas including connectivity, technology, governance and people-to-people exchanges, Foreign Minister Shisir Khanal says.

headlines.title: US Fed holds interest rate steady
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON - The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday kept the target range for the federal funds rate unchanged at 3.5-3.75 percent.

headlines.title: France ends contract with US tech giant
headlines.summary: As part of a European push to curb reliance on United States technology companies, France's domestic intelligence service has dropped US giant Palantir in favor of French rival ChapsVision, said France's Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Accord to end war on 'all fronts'
headlines.summary: Ahead of a widely publicized official signing of a memorandum of understanding between Iran and the United States, both sides indicated they would reveal more about the agreed-upon conditions, which include ending the war on "all fronts".

headlines.title: Japan slammed over slow probe into embassy attack
headlines.summary: China has criticized the lack of progress in Japan's investigation into and handling of a case involving a Self-Defense Forces officer who allegedly entered the Chinese embassy in Tokyo armed with a knife, urging Japan to take full responsibility for the incident.

headlines.title: Ram temple needs CEO, says Nripendra Misra; backs Uttar Pradesh government action in donation row
headlines.summary: Nripendra Misra supports Uttar Pradesh's government's actions on Ram Temple donation issues, advocating for enhanced management and transparency measures.

headlines.title: Three arrested in RSS office attack in Ranchi
headlines.summary: Three individuals arrested for attacking the RSS office in Ranchi with petrol bombs; police investigating under multiple legal provisions.

headlines.title: Prime Minister to disburse ₹2,400 crore worth incentives to new employees, employers
headlines.summary: Prime Minister Modi to distribute ₹2,400 crore incentives under PM-VBRY, benefiting 15 lakh new employees and employers.

headlines.title: PM Modi to release next instalment of PM Kisan scheme on June 20
headlines.summary: PM Modi to launch PM Kisan scheme's 23rd instalment and a new crop insurance plan for 1.10 crore farmers on June 20.

headlines.title: Only 10.2% women fielded in 20 Assembly polls since passage of women’s Bill in 2023: report
headlines.summary: Only 10.2% of candidates in recent polls are women, highlighting ongoing gender disparities despite the 2023 women's reservation Bill.

headlines.title: The paint is already peeling in Trump's renovated Washington Reflecting Pool
headlines.summary: Reuters: The paint is already peeling in Trump's renovated Washington Reflecting Pool.

headlines.title: MSCI raises new Indonesia transparency concerns ahead of emerging markets verdict
headlines.summary: Reuters: MSCI raises new Indonesia transparency concerns ahead of emerging markets verdict.

headlines.title: US tells ASML it's concerned one of its chipmaking tools may be in China, Bloomberg News reports
headlines.summary: Reuters: US tells ASML it's concerned one of its chipmaking tools may be in China, Bloomberg News reports.

headlines.title: EXCLUSIVE: Meta lobbies Congress for protection from child-harm lawsuits
headlines.summary: Reuters: EXCLUSIVE: Meta lobbies Congress for protection from child-harm lawsuits.

headlines.title: Yen nears weakest in 40 years as BOJ hike fails to stem rout
headlines.summary: Reuters: Yen nears weakest in 40 years as BOJ hike fails to stem rout.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP
hackerNews.summary: The Enterprise-Managed Authorization extension to the Model Context Protocol is now stable, enabling organizations to centrally provision MCP server access through their identity provider so users get connected servers on first login without per-app OAuth.

hackerNews.title: Datasette Apps: Host custom HTML applications inside Datasette
hackerNews.summary: Today we launched a new plugin for Datasette, datasette-apps, with this launch announcement post on the Datasette project blog. That post has the what, but I’m going to expand on …

hackerNews.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
hackerNews.summary: This is the story of how I found 10,000 repositories on GitHub that distribute Trojan malware. They are all from different contributors, have different names, and are not forks of other repositories. But they share a common pattern, which is what allowed me to write a script to find

hackerNews.title: Ubiquiti: Enterprise NAS, Built on ZFS
hackerNews.summary: Discover ENAS, the license-free enterprise storage platform featuring native ZFS, secure UniFi management, scalable petabyte-class capacity, multi-site backups, and shared iSCSI storage for modern business infrastructure.

hackerNews.title: Zork name origin got an update on Wikipedia
CS 6120: Advanced Compilers: The Self-Guided Online Course (2020)
hackerNews.summary: CS 6120 is a PhD-level Cornell CS course by Adrian Sampson on programming language implementation. It covers universal compilers topics like intermediate representations, data flow, and “classic” optimizations as well as more research-flavored topics such as parallelization, just-in-time compilation, and garbage collection. The work consists of reading papers and open-source hacking tasks, which use LLVM and an educational IR invented just for this class .

hackerNews.title: Building a robotics research setup that lives next to my desk
hackerNews.summary: The first note in an independent robotics research project: a complete tabletop manipulation setup—industrial arm, two cameras, teleoperation, and a software stack built from scratch—for under €5,000.

hackerNews.title: Hospitals and universities repurposing drugs at lower cost
hackerNews.summary: Universities and hospitals are repurposing existing drugs through late-stage trials with funded costs up to 90% lower than those taking place in the pharmaceutical industry.

hackerNews.title: I told them forced consent was unlawful. 5 years later it cost Elkjop €1.8M
hackerNews.summary: Datatilsynet just fined Elkjop NOK 20 million (€1.8m) for the forced consent in its loyalty club — five years after I told their DPO it was unlawful.

hackerNews.title: Launch HN: TesterArmy (YC P26) – Agents that test web and mobile apps
hackerNews.summary: TesterArmy runs real tests against your site or mobile app. Get screenshots, recordings, and bug reports - no test scripts to maintain.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: U.S. moves toward troop reductions in Europe as Hegseth scolds NATO allies (The United States will review force levels and is immediately cutting the number of assets it would activate for the continent in a crisis); First steps in peace deal demand far more from U.S. than Iran (The memorandum of understanding requires numerous steps by Washington including lifting sanctions and freeing billions in frozen assets, while Iran was required only to open the Strait of Hormuz); and Ukraine pummels Russian capital with what may be largest drone strike yet on Moscow (After weeks of intensifying bombing of Kyiv, Ukraine hit back with a swarm of drones, damaging buildings and igniting an oil refinery).
Markets leaned higher, with 5 of 7 tracked indexes up; NASDAQ Composite up 1.91% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.
